spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates `reading-flow` and `reading-order` decoupling DOM order from tab/AT order — the headline of the v137 spec.

interactive.rationale: Mode buttons drive normal, grid-row, grid-column, and explicit reading-order flows; focus logs update live for the grid and absolute-positioned cards.

edge_cases.rationale: Now includes visible screen-reader/narration order and an absolute-positioned `grid-order` example. Contenteditable interaction remains out of scope for this concept.

references.rationale: The see-also section now links to the correct ChromeStatus feature 5113638848561152.

summary: Strong demo of the core spec change. Chrome DevTools MCP verification exercised all mode buttons plus the absolute-positioned card focus log with a clean console.
